jobs.title: Senior ML Engineer — Recommendations
jobs.description: Build next-gen personalization models for Blinkit's product feed. Work on real-time ranking and CTR optimization.

jobs.title: Staff Data Scientist — Supply Chain
jobs.description: Optimize dark store inventory placement and demand forecasting using ML. Focus on reducing wastage and stockouts.

jobs.title: City Operations Lead — Pune
jobs.description: Lead ground-up launch of Blinkit operations in Pune. Manage dark store setup, rider onboarding, and local vendor contracts.

jobs.title: City Operations Lead — Ahmedabad
jobs.description: Own Blinkit's entry into Ahmedabad. End-to-end responsibility from dark store location scouting to go-live.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — Loyalty
jobs.description: Own Blinkit Club loyalty programme product roadmap. Define retention mechanics and subscription tier strategy.

jobs.title: Growth Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Drive customer acquisition campaigns in Tier 2 cities. Own performance marketing budgets and OEM partnerships.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer — Payments
jobs.description: Build payment infrastructure for Blinkit's B2B commerce vertical. BNPL integrations and merchant payouts.

jobs.title: Legal Counsel — Regulatory Affairs
jobs.description: Handle compliance for quick commerce operations across new city launches. FSSAI and state-level regulatory liaising.

note: Analyze the distribution of job titles to infer strategic priorities
